summary: Completed and narrowed the stop. Removing CPU0/CPU1 NSI port reads did not let the test proceed. The kernel reached mmcblk0, started CMD18, applied H021 subset writes, read CCU NSI as ccu_nsi=0x43000005 and ccu_bus_nsi=0x00010000, dumped ports 1/11/12/14/15, then went silent. No diag enable A733 NSI minimum line, no 0x580/0x584 write result, no post-nsi-minimum dump, no dma-entry, and no descriptor outcome were captured. The next test should remove IAG reads from the behavior path and split the 0x580 and 0x584 writes with hard breadcrumbs/delays.
